user.title: Outbound Webhooks
user.description: Adds the Send request action so you can build and fire HTTP requests to external APIs from your automations.

abort.already_configured: Outbound Webhooks is already set up.

send.name: Send request
send.description: Sends an HTTP request to an external URL.

url.name: URL
url.description: The endpoint to send the request to.

headers.name: Headers
headers.description: Additional request headers as key/value rows.

credential.name: API key / token
credential.description: Used as the Bearer token or the X-API-Key value, depending on the authentication type.

content_type.name: Content type
content_type.description: The Content-Type header for the body.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds to wait before giving up.
